vBRIEFInfo.author: agent:claude-opus-4.8
vBRIEFInfo.description: Scope vBRIEF: increase the rain-warning line font size by 50% for legibility

narratives.Overview: The 'Rain possible within ~Xhrs' line on the main weather badge is too small to read at a glance while riding. Increase its font size by 50% (caption ~12pt -> ~18pt).
narratives.Goals: Make the rain-warning line 50% larger without disturbing the temperature display or layout.
narratives.FunctionalRequirements:
FR-1: The rain-warning line (icon + text) MUST render 50% larger than its current caption size.
FR-2: The temperature row and existing colors/spacing MUST be unchanged.
narratives.Architecture: WeatherBadgeView: replace the rain line's .caption font with a fixed .system(size: 18) so the increase is deterministic; the cloud.rain.fill icon scales with the same font.
narratives.TestingStrategy: Build on the simulator and review the badge visually; existing unit tests for rain text formatting remain valid.

narrative.Acceptance: The rain-warning line renders at ~18pt; temperature row unchanged.
